name.ja: <ruby>悪<rt>あく</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby><ruby>鏡<rt>かがみ</rt></ruby>の<ruby>招<rt>しょう</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt>らい</rt></ruby>

effect.en: Ritual Summon "Fiend's Mirror" or "Absorbing Fiend's Mirror" by sending face-up Fiend Type monsters from your field to the Graveyard whose total Levels equal 6 or more as material (you cannot use more monsters than necessary as material). Then, if you have "Beastly Mirror Ritual" in your Graveyard, you can destroy 1 card on your opponent's field.
